General.Name: Vixtel Technologies Holdings Ltd
General.Description: International Business Digital Technology Limited, an investment holding company, provides Internet and Web application performance management (APM) products and services to telecommunication operators and large enterprises in Mainland China, Taiwan, and Hong Kong. It offers APM products and service solutions, such as integrated APM system solutions to manage and monitor applications and networks. The company also provides technical services, such as operational support, system maintenance, network analysis, and optimization of full chain of internet applications and research studies of topics on application and network performance; and sells embedded hardware and APM software. In addition, it offers central bank digital currencies solutions, which include software development services, such as development of supporting software for upgrade and expansion of APM products. The company was formerly known as Vixtel Technologies Holdings Limited and changed its name to International Business Digital Technology Limited in June 2023. The company was founded in 2006 and is based in Beijing, the People's Republic of China. International Business Digital Technology Limited is a subsidiary of International Business Digital Technology Group Limited.
